overview: Jewel of the East Group hotel website with dedicated pages for Jewel Himalayan Heights (Gangtok) and Jewel Kongchen Retreat (Lachung).
features: Homepage with hero image and property cards
Dedicated hotel pages with photo gallery, amenities, room types, nearby attractions, reviews, and FAQ
Admin dashboard for managing content, images, testimonials, and policies
Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, and Booking & Refund Policy pages
